description: REQ-016 acceptance criteria (line 310) states 'Event emission (publish) occurs in Step 3 (SaveNoteRequested, NoteFileSaved/NoteSaveFailed)'. This groups SaveNoteRequested with Step 3 events, contradicting REQ-008 which places SaveNoteRequested at the state transition between Step 1 and Step 3.

evidence.snippet: - Event emission (`publish`) occurs in Step 3 (SaveNoteRequested, NoteFileSaved/NoteSaveFailed) and optionally in Step 4 (TagInventoryUpdated).
